excerpt: Surah Al-Ikhlas is the summary and conclusion of the entire Qur'an, which was revealed at the end, so that both the opening and closing of the doors of religion are pure.
source_location_hint: On the correspondence between beginning and end of revelation

excerpt: He has made the first intellect the cause of all the other intellects and intellects, and it is superior to that it is the cause of anything.
source_location_hint: On causation and the First Intellect

excerpt: Allah is the Essence and that He has ninety-nine attributes which have also been described by name... through knowledge we support the Oneness of the Creator.
source_location_hint: On divine attributes and the path to Unity

excerpt: Reciting the Qur'an three times is equivalent to reciting the whole Qur'an... Every complete form, which comprises a thousand years, is comparable to Surah Al-Ikhlas.
source_location_hint: On the relationship between Surah Al-Ikhlas and cosmic cycles

excerpt: The Companions of the Two Weeks, because they gathered the two weeks before them... these four gatherings are a summary of the 7,000 years of the seventy period.
source_location_hint: On the structure of imamic epochs and their gatherings

excerpt: From the time of Imam Ali al-Tayyib onwards, the believers have no way to reach the Imams. All the believers, supplications and arguments, became dependent on him.
source_location_hint: On the station of Imam Ali al-Tayyib and the Epoch of Occultation

excerpt: The period of Kashf collects 50,000 years and the Qayyim of Seventy 7,000 years... This period of laziness is counted in the period of seventy (3,000 + 50,000 + 7,000 = 57,000).
source_location_hint: On the structure of cycles and their numerical correspondences

excerpt: The word al-Rahman appears 57 times in the Qur'an... referring to the person who encompasses the 57,000-year gathering.
source_location_hint: On numerical symbolism in the Qur'an

excerpt: My relation to the ten commandments is established through the Surah of Oneness, and I am the embodiment of this Surah; every 10,000 years a form appears, and I am within it.
source_location_hint: On the transcendent station of Ali ibn Abi Talib
